Formation Energy MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of formation energies for the first Al-Cu-Mg-Zn OQMD structure slice compared to DFT [eV/atom]  
Level of theory: PBE

Volume MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of volumes per atom for the first Al-Cu-Mg-Zn OQMD structure slice compared to DFT [Å³/atom]  
Level of theory: PBE

Lattice Constant MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of lattice constants for the first Al-Cu-Mg-Zn OQMD structure slice compared to DFT [Å]  
Level of theory: PBE

Beta Angle MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of beta lattice angles for the first Al-Cu-Mg-Zn OQMD structure slice compared to DFT [degrees]  
Level of theory: PBE

Solute-Solute Binding MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of opt-in solute-solute binding energies by neighbor shell for Al-matrix and Cu-matrix pairs compared to DFT [meV]  
Level of theory: PBE

Bulk Modulus MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of opt-in finite-strain bulk moduli for the staged Al-Cu-Mg-Zn structure slice compared to DFT [GPa]  
Level of theory: PBE

Shear Modulus MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of opt-in finite-strain shear moduli for the staged Al-Cu-Mg-Zn structure slice compared to DFT [GPa]  
Level of theory: PBE

Elastic Constant MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of opt-in finite-strain elastic constants for the staged Al-Cu-Mg-Zn structure slice compared to DFT [GPa]  
Level of theory: PBE

Surface Energy MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of legacy FCC and HCP surface energies for pure Al, Cu, Mg, and Zn references compared to DFT [mJ/m²]  
Level of theory: PBE

Stacking Fault Energy MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of relaxed FCC stable and unstable stacking-fault energies for pure Al and Cu references compared to DFT [mJ/m²]  
Level of theory: PBE

GSF Energy MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of relaxed Theta and Theta double-prime generalized stacking-fault energy points compared to DFT [eV/Å²]  
Level of theory: PBE

Solute-Stacking Fault MAE.value:
Mean absolute error of relaxed solute-stacking-fault interaction energies by solute layer compared to DFT [eV]  
Level of theory: PBE

tooltip_header.MLIP: Model identifier, hover for configuration details.
tooltip_header.Score: Weighted score across metrics, Higher is better (normalised 0 to 1).
